pi_items.source: Official WooCommerce documentation (woocommerce.com/document/add-to-cart-redirect/) confirms this setting controls 'Redirect to the cart page after successful addition' in WooCommerce > Settings > Products > General. Value format is 'yes'/'no' as confirmed in setup_task.sh line 26.

Official WooCommerce documentation (woocommerce.com/document/configuring-woocommerce-settings/products/) confirms this setting controls 'Enable AJAX add to cart buttons on archives'. Value format is 'yes'/'no' as confirmed in setup_task.sh line 27.

Official WooCommerce documentation (wpdesk.net/blog/change-weight-unit-in-woocommerce/) and woocommerce.com/document/configuring-woocommerce-settings/products/ confirm available weight units include 'kg', 'g', 'lbs', 'oz'. Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 30.

Official WooCommerce documentation (woocommerce.com/document/configuring-woocommerce-settings/products/) confirms available dimension units include 'cm', 'mm', 'in', 'yd'. Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 31.

Official WooCommerce documentation (woocommerce.com/document/configuring-woocommerce-settings/products/) confirms 'Enable Product Reviews' checkbox controls this setting. Value format is 'yes'/'no' as confirmed in setup_task.sh line 34.

Verified through WooCommerce code reference (github.com issue #26561) which confirms this option controls display of 'Verified owner' label on reviews. Value format is 'yes'/'no' as confirmed in setup_task.sh line 35.

Official WooCommerce documentation confirms this setting controls 'Reviews can only be left by verified owners' in the Reviews section of WooCommerce > Settings > Products > General. Value format is 'yes'/'no' as confirmed in setup_task.sh line 36.

Official WooCommerce documentation (woocommerce.com/document/configuring-woocommerce-settings/products/) confirms 'Enable star rating on reviews' setting controls this option. Value format is 'yes'/'no' as confirmed in setup_task.sh line 37.

Official WooCommerce documentation (woocommerce.com/document/configuring-woocommerce-settings/products/) and GitHub issue #25656 confirm this setting controls 'Star ratings should be required, not optional'. Value format is 'yes'/'no' as confirmed in setup_task.sh line 38.
Calculated from metadata.scoring_points in task.json: 12+12+12+12+8+12+12+8+12 = 100. Verifier.py scales this to 90 points for programmatic check (line 81) plus 10 for workflow (line 100).

WooCommerce environment is created from scratch via docker-compose and wp plugin install (setup_woocommerce.sh). Sample product data is seeded via WP-CLI (lines 235-246). All data is generated, not from external sources.

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims have been verified. The task configures 9 WooCommerce product settings found in WooCommerce > Settings > Products > General: (1) cart redirect enabled, (2) AJAX add-to-cart disabled, (3) weight unit set to kg, (4) dimensions unit set to cm, (5-9) review settings including enabling reviews and star ratings, requiring verified owner for reviews, and requiring star ratings. All setting names and target values (yes/no format) are confirmed against official WooCommerce documentation. The scoring system allocates 100 points across the 9 settings (8 settings worth 12 points, 2 settings worth 8 points each), which the verifier scales to 90 points for programmatic verification plus 10 points for workflow validation. The data is synthetic, generated from a fresh WooCommerce installation.
